field_derivation_notes.breadth_history: advancing_issues/declining_issues history from local daily breadth artifacts

missing_reasons.main7_concentration: requires both main7_returns and main7_weights; no fake equal weights are used
missing_reasons.main7_returns: requires Main-7 symbol return fields or today's and previous trading-day closes; no previous closes found
missing_reasons.main7_weights: requires Main-7 market-cap or turnover weights; equal-weight fallback is forbidden
missing_reasons.otc_return_pct: requires OTC index return provider; no OTC source available
missing_reasons.sector_above_ma20: requires sector provider MA20 status; nullable interface only until real sector source is supplied
missing_reasons.sector_breadth: requires sector provider breadth data; no sector source available
missing_reasons.sector_diffusion: requires sector_returns and sector_above_ma20; no sector provider source available
missing_reasons.sector_returns: requires sector provider returns; nullable interface only until real sector source is supplied
missing_reasons.small_mid_breadth: requires small/mid breadth provider; no source available
missing_reasons.small_mid_weakness: requires otc_return_pct and small_mid_breadth; no source available
missing_reasons.turnover_concentration_topn: requires symbol-level turnover_amount rows; aggregate market turnover cannot produce Top-N concentration
